summary: Seven hand-authored read-only analysis commands (coldstart, scaling, failures, drift, secrets-audit, stale, plan-fit) deriving cold-start/scaling/failure analytics from App Insights KQL and ARM that Azure does not expose directly.
reason: These are the CLI's novel value (NOI = cold-start/plan-fit observatory); the generator emits CRUD scaffolds, not domain analytics.
validated_outcome: All seven live-validated against a real Function App (manual acceptance) and pass the dogfood matrix.
